mapper.insert: MERGE INTO TOTAL_INTERACTION_LOG AS TARGET USING (SELECT #{UNIQUEID} AS INTERACTION_ID) AS SOURCE ON (TARGET.INTERACTION_ID = SOURCE.INTERACTION_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET SOURCE_ID = #{LINKEDID}, REC_FILE = #{REC_FILE}, UPDTIME = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (INTERACTION_ID, CMPYCD, MEDIA_TYPE, SOURCE_ID, DIRECTION, SRC_NO, DST_NO, START_TIME, STATUS, RESULT_CD, REC_FILE, ADDTIME) VALUES (#{UNIQUEID}, #{CMPYCD}, #{MEDIA_TYPE}, #{LINKEDID}, #{DIRECTION}, #{SRC_NO}, #{DST_NO}, ISNULL(#{START_TIME}, GETDATE()), '010', '100', #{REC_FILE}, GETDATE());
mapper.update: UPDATE TOTAL_INTERACTION_LOG SET ANSWER_TIME = GETDATE(), STATUS = '200', RESULT_CD = '200', EXTEN = #{EXTEN}, USERID = #{USERID}, EXT_DATA = (SELECT #{QUEUE_NM} AS queue_nm FOR JSON PATH, WITHOUT_ARRAY_WRAPPER) WHERE INTERACTION_ID = #{UNIQUEID}

UPDATE TOTAL_INTERACTION_LOG SET END_TIME = GETDATE(), TALK_SEC = DATEDIFF(SECOND, ISNULL(ANSWER_TIME, START_TIME), GETDATE()), HANGUP_CAUSE = CAST(#{HANGUP_CAUSE} AS VARCHAR), RESULT_CD = #{RESULT_CD}, REC_FILE = #{REC_FILE}, STATUS = '300' WHERE INTERACTION_ID = #{UNIQUEID}
mapper.select: SELECT TOP 1 USEYN FROM HABA900T_TBL WHERE CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND CDTYPE = '605' AND CODECD = '000'

SELECT TOP 1 B.CUSTCD, B.CUSTNM, ISNULL(A.PHONENO, B.TELNO) AS HPNO, B.EMAIL FROM PHONE_NUMBER_MAP A INNER JOIN HABA020T_TBL B ON B.CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND A.CUSTCD = B.CUSTCD WHERE REPLACE(A.PHONENO, '-', '') = REPLACE(#{PHONE}, '-', '') AND A.USEYN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CALL_MST_TBL (CMPYCD, SVCNO, DEPTCD, CUSTCD, SVCYMD, TRB_MENT, ANS_MENT, START_TIME, END_TIME, CONSULTID, REC_FILE, INTERACTION_ID, ADDTIME, UPDTIME, UPDEMP) VALUES (#{CMPYCD}, #{SVCNO}, #{DEPTCD}, #{CUSTCD}, #{SVCYMD}, #{TRB_MENT}, #{ANS_MENT}, #{START_TIME}, #{END_TIME}, #{CONSULTID}, #{REC_FILE}, #{INTERACTION_ID}, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{UPDEMP})
